termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: By using the Huzur app, you agree to the following terms of service. Please read these terms carefully.

sections.title: 1. License to Use
sections.content: This application is provided free of charge for personal and non-commercial use. Modifying, copying, or distributing the application is prohibited.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.content: Huzur app is a mobile application that provides prayer times, Quran, prayers, and religious content. The application uses third-party APIs to provide data, and the accuracy of this data is not guaranteed.

sections.title: 3. User Responsibilities
list: Must use the application in accordance with the law
Must not misuse the content of the application
Must not use the application to the detriment of others
Must not compromise the security of the application

sections.title: 4. Disclaimer
sections.content: The application is provided "as is". No guarantee is given for the accuracy of prayer times and other information. Users should consult official sources for important religious practices.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content, design, and code of the application are protected by copyright. Quran texts and prayers are public domain, but the application itself is copyrighted.

sections.title: 6. Service Changes
sections.content: The application may be changed, updated, or discontinued without prior notice. Users should be aware of these changes.

sections.title: 7. Cancellation and Termination
sections.content: Use of the application may be cancelled at any time and for any reason. Users' access may be terminated if they violate the application terms.

sections.title: 8. Changes
sections.content: These terms of service may be updated from time to time. Important changes will be notified within the application.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.content: Please contact us for any questions regarding the terms of service.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: As Huzur app, we value our users' privacy. This privacy policy explains how our application collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

sections.title: 1. Collected Data
sections.content: Our application may collect the following data:
list: Location Information: Location information is used to show prayer times and weather correctly. This information is stored only on your device and is not sent to our servers.
Device Information: Basic device information may be used for the proper functioning of the application.

sections.title: 2. Data Usage
sections.content: Collected data is used only for the following purposes:

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: Your personal data is not shared with third parties. The application uses Aladhan API for prayer times, Open-Meteo API for weather, and BigDataCloud API for location information. The privacy policies of these services apply.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: Your data is stored securely on your device. The application protects sensitive information with encryption technologies.

sections.title: 5. Permissions
sections.content: The application may request the following permissions:

sections.title: 6. Advertising and Analytics
sections.content: Our application uses Google AdMob advertising service and Google Firebase Analytics. These services may collect device identifiers (GAID) to provide personalized ads and analyze application usage. You can manage your ad preferences from application settings or device settings.

sections.title: 7. AI Assistant
sections.content: Pollinations AI service is used to answer your religious questions. Your questions are sent to this service and answers are received. Please avoid entering your personal information into this service.

sections.title: 8. Changes
sections.content: This privacy policy may be updated from time to time. Important changes will be notified within the application.

sections.title: 9. Contact
sections.content: For questions about our privacy policy: huzurapp.destek@gmail.com
